title: Earthy Flaky French Chicken Gratin
description: A low-calorie, earthy French dish featuring chicken, mushrooms, and a hint of salsa, all wrapped in a flaky crust. Perfect for a quick and satisfying dinner.

ingredients.name: mixed mushrooms
ingredients.notes: such as cremini, shiitake, and button

instructions: In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat. Add the chicken and cook until browned, about 5-6 minutes. Remove from heat and set aside.
In the same skillet, add the mushrooms and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown, about 5 minutes. Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Stir in the salsa, thyme, salt, and pepper. Bring to a simmer and cook for 2-3 minutes.
Add the cooked chicken back into the skillet and stir to combine with the mushroom mixture.
Roll out the puff pastry on a lightly floured surface to a thickness of about 1/8 inch. Transfer the pastry to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Spoon the chicken and mushroom mixture into the center of the pastry, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Sprinkle the grated cheese over the top of the filling.
Fold the edges of the pastry up over the filling, pressing gently to seal. Brush the pastry with a little bit of water and cut a few slits in the top to allow steam to escape.
Bake the gratin for 25-30 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown and the filling is hot and bubbly.
